title: croton neblinae
intro: Croton neblinae, also known as the Croton or Devil's Backbone, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Croton neblinae include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Croton neblinae can be made into a paste or powder, often mixed with other herbs, and applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
